title: cremanthodium bhutanicum
intro: Cremanthodium bhutanicum, also known as Bhutan cremanthodium, is a rare and endangered flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region. It belongs to the Asteraceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Cremanthodium bhutanicum is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in the Himalayan region.
